prompt: Any advice on easing into a high-volume hypertrophy-focused mesocycle after a powerlifting meet without losing my strength gains?
expected_output: They recommend keeping the competition lifts in moderate strength-relevant ranges instead of shifting entirely to high reps. A practical template is three weeks mostly in the 5-10 rep range, then one week including heavier triples to keep top-end strength exposure. They also suggest an over-warm single around RPE 8 before volume work to preserve neural readiness with limited fatigue. The core point is to keep at least some heavy practice while accumulating hypertrophy volume.
assertions: Answer captures the core SBS position on post-meet hypertrophy without strength loss
Answer includes key specific details, numbers, or mechanisms mentioned by the hosts
Answer acknowledges important caveats or limitations discussed by the hosts
Answer includes actionable practical recommendations consistent with the hosts' advice
Answer does not contradict the hosts' stated position
